TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Jeff_Ayres, title = Jeff_Ayres, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jeff_Ayres} }

S.FORM: Jeff Ayres hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa pzyang pkaki' tay kska' / pkaki' kkska'. kawas tay 1987, ryax sa tay 29 nqu tay 4, Jeff Ayres, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Jeff Ayres hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa pzyang pkaki' tay kska' / pkaki' kkska'. kawas tay 1987, ryax sa tay 29 nqu tay 4, Jeff Ayres, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *e** ajres~ɕ ħjaʔɣa nβa pɣnawʔ mariʔ mis~ɕuw qanij, qutux s~ɕa pzjaŋ pkakiʔ taj ks~ɕkaʔ / pkakiʔ kks~ɕkaʔ. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, *e** ajres~ɕ, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
